emails.subject: Couple questions
emails.body: Couple questions Greetings: Left you a voicemail over the weekend. Was traveling Thurs/Fri, but got a chance to look at your reorg memo, and listened in on the call on Friday. I've got a few questions. You have 15-20 minutes today to discuss a bit? Greatly appreciated. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Re: Couple questions
emails.body: Re: Couple questions Will call later Rick S. Sent: Mon Nov 19 09:53:35 2001

emails.subject: RE: Couple questions
emails.body: RE: Couple questions Thanks. I'm on the California 8:30 (pst) call till about 9:30. Best, Jeff To: Dasovich, Jeff
